title: claytonia minutissima
intro: Claytonia minutissima, also known as the Spring Beauty or Small-flowered Spring Beauty, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Montiaceae. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in medicinal properties, particularly in vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals such as iron and calcium. The leaves have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Claytonia minutissima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
